findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Zip Slip - File construction from ZipEntry name without canonical path check
 * @description ZipEntry name used to construct File without verifying the canonical path stays within destination directory
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/zip-slip-no-canonical-check
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find File constructions derived from ZipEntry.getName() in extraction methods
from MethodCall getName, ClassInstanceExpr fileExpr, Method enclosing
where
  // Source: ZipEntry.getName()
  getName.getMethod().hasName("getName") and
  getName.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.util.zip", "ZipEntry") and
  // Sink: File constructor argument
  fileExpr.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
  // The File constructor is in the same method as the getName call or a called helper
  enclosing = fileExpr.getEnclosingCallable() and
  // Check if getCanonicalPath is NOT called nearby (no check)
  not exists(MethodCall canon |
    canon.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") and
    canon.getEnclosingCallable() = enclosing
  ) and
  not exists(MethodCall canon |
    canon.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") and
    canon.getEnclosingCallable() = enclosing
  ) and
  // Taint flows from getName to the file constructor arg
  TaintTracking::localTaint(DataFlow::exprNode(getName), DataFlow::exprNode(fileExpr.getAnArgument()))
select fileExpr, "File constructed from ZipEntry name in method '" + enclosing.getName() + "' without canonical path verification - potential Zip Slip."
findings.hypothesis: File constructed from ZipEntry.getName() without getCanonicalPath() containment check in the same method

message.text: File constructed from ZipEntry name in method 'process' without canonical path verification - potential Zip Slip.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ZipEntry name to File construction in any zt-zip class
 * @description Find all places where ZipEntry.getName() derived values reach File constructors across all zt-zip classes
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/ztzip-zipentry-to-file
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find File constructions in unpack/extract methods that take ZipEntry as parameter
from Callable enclosing, ClassInstanceExpr fileExpr, Parameter zipEntryParam
where
  // Method has a ZipEntry parameter
  zipEntryParam.getCallable() = enclosing and
  zipEntryParam.getType().(RefType).getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.util.zip", "ZipEntry") and
  // Constructs a File
  fileExpr.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
  fileExpr.getEnclosingCallable() = enclosing and
  // In zt-zip source
  enclosing.getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("org.zeroturnaround.zip%") and
  // Taint from ZipEntry parameter to File constructor
  TaintTracking::localTaint(DataFlow::parameterNode(zipEntryParam), DataFlow::exprNode(fileExpr.getAnArgument()))
select fileExpr, enclosing.getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + enclosing.getName() + 
  "() at line " + fileExpr.getLocation().getStartLine() + 
  " constructs File from ZipEntry parameter '" + zipEntryParam.getName() + "'"
findings.hypothesis: ZipEntry parameter taint flows to File construction in zt-zip extraction helper methods

message.text: UnpackingCallback.process() at line 683 constructs File from ZipEntry parameter 'zipEntry'

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ZipEntry name flows to File without any containment check
 * @description Find extraction code where ZipEntry name reaches File construction with no startsWith or canonical path guard
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/zip-no-containment-check
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Check if a method has any path containment guard (startsWith, getCanonicalPath, toRealPath, normalize)
predicate hasContainmentCheck(Callable c) {
  exists(MethodCall mc | mc.getEnclosingCallable() = c |
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("normalize") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("startsWith")
  )
}

from MethodCall getName, ClassInstanceExpr fileExpr, Callable enclosing
where
  // ZipEntry.getName() source
  getName.getMethod().hasName("getName") and
  getName.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.util.zip", "ZipEntry") and
  // File constructor sink
  fileExpr.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
  enclosing = fileExpr.getEnclosingCallable() and
  // In zt-zip source
  enclosing.getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("org.zeroturnaround.zip%") and
  // No containment check in the enclosing method
  not hasContainmentCheck(enclosing) and
  // Local taint flow
  TaintTracking::localTaint(DataFlow::exprNode(getName), DataFlow::exprNode(fileExpr.getAnArgument()))
select fileExpr, enclosing.getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + enclosing.getName() +
  "() constructs File from ZipEntry name with NO containment check (no startsWith/getCanonicalPath/toRealPath)"
findings.hypothesis: File constructed from ZipEntry name with no containment check (no startsWith, getCanonicalPath, or toRealPath) in the method

message.text: UnpackingCallback.process() constructs File from ZipEntry name with NO containment check (no startsWith/getCanonicalPath/toRealPath)

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ZipUtil unpack methods - identify all File construction from ZipEntry with or without checks
 * @description Enumerate all methods in ZipUtil that construct Files from ZipEntry names, noting what checks exist
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/ziputil-unpack-file-construction
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

predicate hasCanonicalCheck(Callable c) {
  exists(MethodCall mc | mc.getEnclosingCallable() = c |
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath")
  )
}

predicate hasStartsWithCheck(Callable c) {
  exists(MethodCall mc | mc.getEnclosingCallable() = c |
    mc.getMethod().hasName("startsWith")
  )
}

string checkSummary(Callable c) {
  if hasCanonicalCheck(c) and hasStartsWithCheck(c)
  then result = "HAS_CANONICAL+STARTSWITH"
  else if hasCanonicalCheck(c)
  then result = "HAS_CANONICAL_ONLY"
  else if hasStartsWithCheck(c)
  then result = "HAS_STARTSWITH_ONLY"
  else result = "NO_CHECK"
}

from ClassInstanceExpr fileExpr, Callable enclosing, MethodCall getName
where
  getName.getMethod().hasName("getName") and
  getName.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.util.zip", "ZipEntry") and
  fileExpr.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
  enclosing = fileExpr.getEnclosingCallable() and
  enclosing.getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("org.zeroturnaround.zip%") and
  TaintTracking::localTaint(DataFlow::exprNode(getName), DataFlow::exprNode(fileExpr.getAnArgument()))
select fileExpr,
  enclosing.getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + enclosing.getName() +
  "() line " + fileExpr.getLocation().getStartLine() +
  " check=" + checkSummary(enclosing)
findings.hypothesis: Understand what path validation checks exist in each extraction method that constructs Files from ZipEntry names

message.text: UnpackingCallback.process() line 683 check=NO_CHECK

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Zips and ZipUtil - all File construction from ZipEntry name without canonical check
 * @description Find extraction methods that build File from ZipEntry name without canonical path guard
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/ztzip-unpack-no-canonical
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from Method m, ClassInstanceExpr fileExpr
where
  m.getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("org.zeroturnaround.zip%") and
  fileExpr.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
  fileExpr.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  // Method interacts with ZipEntry getName
  exists(MethodCall gn |
    gn.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
    gn.getMethod().hasName("getName")
  ) and
  // No canonical path check in this method
  not exists(MethodCall cc |
    cc.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
    (cc.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or cc.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath"))
  )
select fileExpr, m.getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + m.getName() + "() constructs File from potential ZipEntry name without canonical path check"
findings.hypothesis: Extraction methods in zt-zip that construct File objects using ZipEntry names without canonical path validation
